homepage.heroSubline: Durable, energy-efficient windows and doors built for Florida's climate. Protect your home with Benton Integrity.
homepage.aboutTitle: Integrity-Driven Window Solutions in North Florida
aboutText: Benton Integrity Replacement Windows & Doors started with a simple mission: provide Jacksonville homeowners with honest, reliable service and premium window solutions that stand up to the Florida climate. We saw too many contractors cutting corners, and families paying the price.

Our approach is straightforward: meticulous craftsmanship, transparent pricing, and a commitment to exceeding expectations. We don't just install windows; we fortify your home against the elements and enhance its value. We work hard to earn trust, one window at a time.

We're proud to be a part of the Jacksonville community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local charities, and treat every project as if it were our own home. We believe in giving back to the neighborhoods that have supported us.

services.name: Residential Window Replacement
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home's beauty and energy efficiency with our residential window replacement services.
services.description:
Replacing your home's windows is a significant investment, and Benton Integrity treats it as such. We begin with a thorough assessment of your existing windows, identifying areas of concern such as drafts, leaks, and structural damage. We then guide you through our wide selection of window styles, materials, and energy-efficient options, ensuring you choose the perfect fit for your home's architecture and your personal preferences. 

Our expert installation team meticulously removes your old windows, prepares the openings, and installs your new windows with precision and care. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper sealing and insulation to maximize energy efficiency and prevent water intrusion. We handle everything from start to finish, including disposal of old windows and thorough cleanup of the work area. We understand the unique challenges Jacksonville homes face, from intense sun to hurricane season, and we provide solutions built to last.

faq.question: How long does window replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the number of windows being replaced and the complexity of the installation. We'll provide a realistic timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: What types of windows do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide variety of window styles and materials, including vinyl, wood, aluminum, and impact-resistant options. We can help you choose the best option for your needs and budget.

faq.question: Do you offer financing options?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options to help make your window replacement project more affordable. Contact us to learn more about our financing plans.

services.name: Impact Window Installation
services.shortDescription: Protect your Jacksonville home from hurricanes with our durable impact window installations.
services.description:
Living in Jacksonville means facing the reality of hurricane season. Impact windows are a crucial investment in protecting your home and family from the devastating effects of high winds and flying debris. Benton Integrity specializes in the installation of high-quality impact windows that meet or exceed Florida building codes. 

Our impact windows are designed to withstand extreme weather conditions, providing superior protection against wind, rain, and intruders. We offer a range of impact-resistant window styles and materials to complement your home's architecture and enhance its curb appeal. Our experienced installers ensure precise and secure installation, guaranteeing optimal performance and long-lasting protection. We understand the importance of peace of mind during hurricane season, and we're committed to providing our customers with the highest level of protection possible. We use only the best brands like PGT and CGI. We also handle permitting and inspections to streamline the process.
process: Step 2: Impact Window Selection and Design

faq.question: What are the benefits of impact windows compared to shutters?
faq.answer: Impact windows offer continuous protection without the need for manual deployment. They also enhance your home's appearance and provide added security.

faq.question: Are impact windows energy-efficient?
faq.answer: Yes, impact windows are designed with energy-efficient features that can help reduce your energy bills and improve your home's comfort.

faq.question: How do I know if my windows need to be replaced with impact windows?
faq.answer: If your current windows are old, damaged, or not rated for hurricane-force winds, it's time to consider upgrading to impact windows.

services.name: Door Replacement
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your home's entryways with our professional door replacement services.
services.description:
Your doors are more than just entryways; they're a reflection of your home's style and security. Benton Integrity offers comprehensive door replacement services to enhance your home's curb appeal, improve energy efficiency, and provide added security. We offer a wide selection of door styles, materials, and finishes to complement your home's architecture and your personal taste.

From elegant front entry doors to durable patio doors, we have the perfect solution for your needs. Our experienced installers ensure precise and professional installation, guaranteeing optimal performance and long-lasting beauty. We handle everything from removing your old doors to installing new hardware and weatherstripping. We also address common issues like door frame rot often found in older Jacksonville homes. We understand the importance of a secure and energy-efficient home, and we're committed to providing our customers with the highest quality door replacement services.
process: Step 1: Door Style and Material Selection
Step 4: Hardware Installation and Finishing Touches

faq.question: What types of doors do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a variety of door styles, including entry doors, patio doors, sliding glass doors, and French doors. We also offer a range of materials, such as wood, fiberglass, and steel.

faq.question: How do I choose the right door for my home?
faq.answer: Consider your home's architecture, your personal style, and your budget. We can help you find the perfect door to meet your needs.

faq.question: Do you offer door repair services?
faq.answer: While we primarily focus on door replacement, we can assess minor repairs during the consultation process. Significant repairs may warrant a full replacement.

services.name: Vinyl Window Installation
services.shortDescription: Affordable, durable, and energy-efficient vinyl window installation for Jacksonville homes.
services.description:
Vinyl windows are a popular choice for Jacksonville homeowners seeking an affordable, durable, and energy-efficient window solution. Benton Integrity offers professional vinyl window installation services to enhance your home's comfort, reduce energy bills, and improve its overall value. Vinyl windows are resistant to rot, warping, and fading, making them an ideal choice for Florida's humid climate.

We offer a wide selection of vinyl window styles and colors to complement your home's architecture and your personal taste. Our experienced installers ensure precise and professional installation, guaranteeing optimal performance and long-lasting beauty. We use only high-quality vinyl windows from trusted manufacturers, ensuring superior energy efficiency and durability. We also offer options for Low-E glass and argon gas fills to further enhance energy savings. We understand the importance of budget-friendly solutions, and we're committed to providing our customers with the best value for their investment.
process: Step 2: Vinyl Window Selection and Color Matching

faq.question: How long do vinyl windows last?
faq.answer: Vinyl windows can last for 20-30 years or more with proper care and maintenance.

faq.question: Are vinyl windows energy-efficient?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl windows are highly energy-efficient and can help reduce your energy bills.

faq.question: Can vinyl windows be painted?
faq.answer: While it's not recommended, vinyl windows can be painted with a special paint formulated for vinyl. However, it's best to choose a color that you'll be happy with for years to come.

services.name: Window Repair
services.shortDescription: Reliable window repair services to fix drafts, leaks, and damaged windows.
services.description:
Don't replace your windows prematurely! Benton Integrity offers expert window repair services to address common issues such as drafts, leaks, broken glass, and damaged frames. Our skilled technicians can diagnose the problem and provide cost-effective solutions to restore your windows to their optimal condition. We understand that window repair can be a more budget-friendly option than full replacement, and we're committed to providing our customers with honest and reliable service.

We repair all types of windows, including wood, vinyl, and aluminum. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs. We also offer weatherstripping and caulking services to improve energy efficiency and prevent water intrusion. We understand the importance of a comfortable and secure home, and we're committed to providing our customers with the best window repair services in Jacksonville. We often see rotting wood frames from moisture damage in older homes, and specialize in fixing that kind of problem with durable materials.
process: Step 2: Accurate Diagnosis and Repair Options
Step 4: Performance Testing and Quality Check

faq.question: How do I know if my windows need to be repaired or replaced?
faq.answer: If your windows are drafty, leaking, or have significant damage, it's time to consider repair or replacement. We can assess your windows and provide honest recommendations.

faq.question: What types of window repairs do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of window repairs, including glass replacement, frame repair, weatherstripping, and caulking.

faq.question: How much does window repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of window repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of repair needed. We'll provide a free estimate before starting any work.

services.name: Commercial Window Replacement
services.shortDescription: Enhance your business with our commercial window replacement services.
services.description:
Benton Integrity Replacement Windows & Doors provides commercial window replacement services to businesses throughout Jacksonville. We understand the importance of energy efficiency, security, and aesthetics for commercial properties. Our experienced team can handle projects of any size, from small retail spaces to large office buildings. We offer a wide selection of commercial-grade windows that meet or exceed industry standards. 

We work closely with business owners and property managers to understand their specific needs and budget. Our commercial window replacement services can improve your building's energy efficiency, reduce noise pollution, enhance its curb appeal, and provide added security. We offer flexible scheduling to minimize disruption to your business operations. We also handle all permitting and inspections to ensure a smooth and hassle-free process. We understand the unique challenges commercial properties face, and we're committed to providing our customers with the best commercial window replacement services in the area.

faq.question: Do you offer after-hours installation for commercial properties?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer flexible scheduling options, including after-hours installation, to minimize disruption to your business operations.

faq.question: What types of commercial windows do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide variety of commercial windows, including storefront windows, curtain wall systems, and energy-efficient windows.

faq.question: Do you handle permitting and inspections for commercial window replacement?
faq.answer: Yes, we handle all permitting and inspections to ensure a smooth and hassle-free process.

serviceAreas.content:
Benton Integrity Replacement Windows & Doors is proud to offer our top-quality window and door replacement services to the historic city of St. Augustine, Florida. We understand the unique architectural character of St. Augustine, with its beautiful Spanish Colonial buildings and historic homes. Our team is experienced in working with a variety of architectural styles and can provide window and door solutions that enhance the beauty and preserve the integrity of your St. Augustine property.

We know that St. Augustine experiences hot, humid summers, and our energy-efficient windows and doors are designed to help you stay comfortable and save money on your energy bills. We offer a wide selection of impact-resistant windows and doors to protect your home from harsh weather. Whether you're looking to replace old, drafty windows or upgrade to more secure and energy-efficient doors, Benton Integrity is here to help.
serviceAreas.localContext: St. Augustine is known for its historic Spanish Colonial architecture and hot, humid summers.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Benton Integrity did an amazing job replacing all the windows in my Ortega Forest home. The crew was professional, efficient, and cleaned up everything perfectly. My house looks so much better, and I've already noticed a difference in my energy bill! I highly recommend them.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Great experience with Benton Integrity. They installed impact windows throughout my beach house. The installation team was very knowledgeable and answered all my questions. They were a little behind schedule, but the quality of work was worth the wait. Glad to have peace of mind during hurricane season.

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: We replaced our old front door with a beautiful new fiberglass door from Benton Integrity. The installers were punctual, courteous, and did a fantastic job. The door looks amazing and has really improved the curb appeal of our home. Highly recommend their door replacement service!

reviews.name: Robert L.
reviews.text: We chose Benton Integrity for our vinyl window replacement project because of their competitive pricing and excellent reputation. The team was professional and efficient, and the windows look great. Our home is much more comfortable, and we're saving money on our energy bills.

reviews.name: Michelle T.
reviews.text: Benton Integrity repaired several of our windows that were leaking and drafty. They were able to fix the problems quickly and efficiently, saving us the cost of replacing the windows. Very happy with their service!

reviews.name: Kevin S.
reviews.text: Benton Integrity replaced all the windows in our office building. The team was professional, efficient, and minimized disruption to our business operations. The new windows look great and have improved the energy efficiency of our building. Highly recommend them for commercial projects!
